entries.title: Galactic Senate Loses Power Before Empire

context.label: Galactic Senate Loses Power Before Empire

content.fact: The Senate continues to exist before the Empire but loses practical power to emergency authority and wartime executive control.
content.injection: During the Clone Wars, show the Senate as relevant but increasingly bypassed by security logic. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Galactic Senate Loses Power Before Empire.

entries.title: Jedi Order Bound To Republic Trap

context.label: Jedi Order Bound To Republic Trap

content.injection: Do not write the Jedi as independent from Republic politics during the war; their authority is entangled with the state.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jedi Order Bound To Republic Trap.
